name: HL/Skin Revitalising Night Cream
benefits: Delivers long-lasting hydration to improve dryness
Helps reduce visible signs of ageing and improves skin texture
Improves elasticity and enhances appearance of skin softness
Leaves skin feeling smooth, soft, plumped, and supple by morning
Supports skin moisturisation for comforted, replenished skin
Suitable for diverse skin types
No added parabens

keyIngredients.name: Glycerin
keyIngredients.role: Attracts and retains moisture; improves hydration; softens skin

keyIngredients.name: Squalane
keyIngredients.role: Supports long-lasting hydration; improves dryness and elasticity

keyIngredients.name: Chamomile, Licorice Root, Rosemary Leaf Extracts

howToUse: Apply to clean, dry skin every evening. Gently massage into face and neck in upward motions until absorbed.
cautions: Contains Vitamin A — consider daily intake before use

name: HL/Skin Ultimate Tension Cream
benefits: Reduces the appearance of wrinkles while enhancing skin elasticity
Leaves skin feeling smooth and soft
Provides effective moisturisation and improves skin hydration
Boosts skin radiance; restores a healthy, natural glow
Rich and velvety texture
Suitable for use under makeup
Suitable for diverse skin types
No added parabens or sulphates

keyIngredients.name: Adenosine
keyIngredients.role: Targets early signs of ageing; reduces fine lines and wrinkles

keyIngredients.name: Niacinamide
keyIngredients.role: Supports skin hydration; targets early signs of ageing

keyIngredients.name: Vitamin B5 (Panthenol)
keyIngredients.role: Hydration; retains moisture; strengthens skin barrier

howToUse: Apply to clean, dry skin each morning. Gently massage onto face and neck in upward motions. Follow with SPF during the day. Suitable under makeup.
cautions: Use SPF protection during the day

name: HL/Skin 10% Niacinamide Serum
benefits: Contains 10% niacinamide (high-concentration formula)
Visibly brightens and evens skin tone
Supports skin's natural moisture balance
Minimises the look of imperfections
Helps fight signs of ageing and reduce wrinkles
Supports and strengthens the skin barrier
Boosts radiance for a healthy, luminous look
Lightweight, fast-absorbing texture
Suitable for diverse skin types
No added parabens or sulphates

keyIngredients.name: Niacinamide (10%)
keyIngredients.role: Evens skin tone; supports barrier; provides hydration; reduces wrinkles

keyIngredients.name: Glycerin
keyIngredients.role: Attracts and locks in moisture; supports barrier function

howToUse: Apply a few drops to clean, dry skin on face and neck. Gently press into skin until absorbed. Use once daily. Follow with SPF during the day.
cautions: May cause irritation on initial use

name: HL/Skin Nourishing Eye Cream
benefits: Targets wrinkles and fine lines around the eye area
Provides refreshing hydration
Locks in moisture to combat dryness
Improves smoothness and radiance around the eyes
Lightweight, non-greasy, and fast-absorbing
Suitable for use under makeup
Suitable for diverse skin types
No added parabens or sulphates

keyIngredients.name: Adenosine & Niacinamide
keyIngredients.role: Hydrate skin; reduce wrinkles; target early signs of ageing

keyIngredients.name: Vitamin B5 (Panthenol)
keyIngredients.role: Supports moisture retention; strengthens skin barrier

keyIngredients.name: Ceramide NP
keyIngredients.role: Supports and restores the skin barrier

howToUse: Apply morning and evening to a cleansed face. Gently press and massage a small amount around the eye contour area.

name: HL/Skin Nourishing Hand & Body Lotion
benefits: Formulated with 6% squalane for moisturising and skin-conditioning
Provides long-lasting moisture and hydration for hands and body
Helps improve dryness
Leaves skin feeling velvet-smooth, soft, and nourished
Lightweight, non-greasy texture absorbs quickly
Suitable for diverse skin types
No added parabens or sulphates

keyIngredients.name: Shea Butter, Jojoba Butter, Cupuaçu Seed Butter

howToUse: Apply daily as needed onto clean, dry skin until absorbed. For hands and body.

name: HL/Skin Resurfacing Gelo Cleanser
benefits: Effectively removes makeup, impurities, and excess oil
Gently purifies skin without over-drying
Leaves skin feeling clean, balanced, and refreshed
Lightweight, foaming gel texture
Suitable for diverse skin types
No added parabens or sulphates

keyIngredients.name: Glycerin
keyIngredients.role: Maintains moisture during cleansing; prevents dryness

howToUse: Apply to wet hands and work into a light foam. Gently massage in circular motions over face and neck. Rinse thoroughly with warm water and pat dry. Use morning and evening.

name: Herbalife Gels CoQ10VITA
benefits: Contains CoQ10 (100 mg per serving) for cellular energy production
High Vitamin E (12 mg, 100% RI) — protects cells from oxidative damage
High Vitamin K (75 µg, 100% RI) — supports blood clotting and bone maintenance
Delicious cherry flavour
Sugar-free and gluten-free

keyIngredients.name: Coenzyme Q10 (100 mg)
keyIngredients.role: Antioxidant; energy production in cells and heart

howToUse: Take 1 chewable gel per day as part of a varied and balanced diet.
cautions: Do not exceed recommended daily dose
Not a substitute for a balanced diet
Keep out of reach of young children

name: Herbalife Collagen Skin Booster
benefits: Contains Verisol® P bioactive collagen peptides — clinically shown to reduce eye wrinkles and improve elasticity after 4 weeks
Vitamin C contributes to normal collagen formation for skin
Biotin, Niacin, Iodine, Vitamin A, Zinc contribute to normal skin maintenance
Selenium, Biotin, Zinc contribute to normal hair maintenance
Zinc, Selenium contribute to normal nail maintenance
Refreshing strawberry & lemon flavour
Gluten-free

keyIngredients.name: Verisol® P Collagen Hydrolysate (2.5 g)
keyIngredients.role: Clinically studied; reduces eye wrinkles; improves elasticity

keyIngredients.name: Zinc (5 mg), Biotin (25 µg), Selenium (28 µg)

howToUse: Mix 1 scoop (5.7 g) with 250 ml water. Enjoy once daily with a meal.
cautions: Food supplement — not a substitute for a balanced diet
Keep out of reach of children
